name: Ginger Grilled Chicken on Apple Rice Papaya Coconut Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds apples, peeled and diced (6 Granny Smith)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the ginger, hot sauce, green onions, nutmeg, lime juice, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
2. Place chicken breasts in a shallow dish and pour the mixture over them. Marinate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
4. Grill chicken until cooked through, about 6-8 minutes per side.
5. In a large pot, combine water and apple juice. Add diced apples, chopped scallions, onion, cinnamon stick, rice, and black pepper. Cook over medium heat for 15 minutes or until rice is tender.
6. Reduce coconut milk by half in a saucepan. Add pimento berries, garlic, scallions, thyme sprigs, tomato, and papaya. Simmer for 10 minutes.
7. To serve, place grilled chicken on top of the apple rice with the papaya-coconut cream mixture.
Posted to Fabfood September 1998~Busted With 2.0 by melizajane@aol.com
